intentSynonyms: look up past activities in uber
fetch a single past activities in uber
view one specific past activities in uber
get recent trip and order history in uber
description: Get the user's recent Uber trip and order history. Returns past rides with destination, date, cost, and a rebook URL. Set show_only_trip to true to exclude non-ride activities (e.g., Uber Eats orders).

show_only_trip.description: Only show trips (exclude Uber Eats, etc.). Default false.
